reasoning_summary: An exported Activity loads a URL from Intent extras into a WebView. While no URL whitelist sanitizer was detected, the static analysis cannot determine whether JavaScript is enabled or whether file access settings are dangerous. Manual review is needed to check WebSettings configuration and whether the WebView handles sensitive data.
evidence_for: Component is exported with no permission
URL from getStringExtra flows to WebView.loadUrl without validation
No URL whitelist or host check detected
evidence_against: Cannot determine if JavaScript is enabled (requires runtime analysis)
Cannot determine if file access is enabled
WebView may only render informational content with no sensitive data
required_follow_up: Check if setJavaScriptEnabled(true) is called on this WebView
Verify what data the WebView page can access
